route_reasons: AccessKey related event → credential misuse risk.
High severity (8.0) but no L3 triggers → prefer L2.

debug_info.query_text_used: event summary: UnauthorizedAccess:IAMUser/InstanceCredentialExfiltration.OutsideAWS Credentials for instance role GeneratedFindingUserName were used from an external IP address. Credentials created exclusively for an EC2 instance using instance role GeneratedFindingUserName have been used from external IP address 198.51.100.0. AccessKey GeneratedFindingAPIName severity 8 | runtime signals: iamuser, aws_api_call, api_generatedfindingapiname, unauthorizedaccess | runtime tags: credential, identity, iam, accesskey | security meaning: instance credentials may have been exfiltrated, compromised workload and unauthorized access require response, data transfer and credential misuse should be investigated | regulatory language: least privilege, privileged access, credential, user account, authentication, identity | expected categories: DSP, IncidentResponse, IVS, IAM | downweight categories: CEK
